subject: [SDC] Update SDC Distribution Client
commit_message:
[SDC] Update SDC Distribution Client

Use the latest (currently on SNAPSHOT) version od SDC Distribution
Client on SO, in order to be able to (later) discuss also with HTTP
protocol

Issue-ID: SO-2792
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I8d49361ba4889a0c4200a9f35901c49534a8f03d

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 4 on the queue.
Set Work In Progress

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-java/4053/

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

This is first to check that new client is working as expected (we should go at least to instantiation from SO) but the client is in SNAPSHOT and so let's not merge it
Set Work In Progress
